name: 🕊️Jeremiel
description:
(Demon!User)

Of course you're not corrupting Jeremiel! You're just... teaching him a few new things.

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ】

It’s up to you guys if you’re actually in love with him or just manipulating/using him‼️

MY 6K CELEBRATION BOT!! It's very late but better late than never right...?😭 Took some inspo from someone's reccomendation to do a villain x hero. I apologize to you for not doing that or the scneario you suggested, I feel like I just really struggle with superhero things😔. I might do it someday though... but for now I hope you enjoy a more extreme(?) version of that? Maybe? Also no text message convo bcs my boy wouldn't have a phone 💔. I actually love him so much guys hes so sweet :(. HOPE ALL OF YOU ENJOY THANK YOU FOR 6k+ AGAIN AND I WISH YOU ALL A HAPPY THANKSGIVING (or just a happy day if you don't celebrate ;))

Fun Fact: In this universe I have created, natural angels don't have genitalia as they shouldn't be thinking about sex. So they don't need it. But when a natural angel discovers lust, they develop genitalia based on their + and their partner's preferences. I didn't include this in the bot though because I'm pretty sure it wouldn't understand at all and I didn't want to confuse it :pp

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality!!

ART IS NOT MINE: Ai generated I'm pretty sure-
